calculation: Read native OpenFOAM collated fields without mutation; record file existence size native-output flag and time-window alignment
validation_checks: exists true, mutated false, exact time present

inputs: seeded CV cells, exchange-interface faces, trusted-wall faces, polyMesh addressing
calculation: Map global seed masks through processor addressing and restrict all reductions to those predeclared cells/faces
validation_checks: selected counts equal seeded contract counts where required

inputs: p,p_rgh,seeded CV cells, interface faces, trusted wall owner cells, volumes, areas
calculation: Compute volume-weighted seeded-CV averages and area-weighted interface/core/trusted-wall averages for p and p_rgh
validation_checks: pressure_basis_released true for Salt2-4 current coarse target windows
current_blocker_or_caveat: Component-loss interpretation still blocked by straight/developing reference and same-QOI UQ

inputs: wallHeatFlux,trusted-wall faces, face areas, patch labels
calculation: Sum native outward wallHeatFlux over trusted-wall faces then define Q_wall_W = -native integral so positive adds heat to seeded fluid
validation_checks: full face coverage, zero missing faces, small NCC patch-label mismatch below tolerance
current_blocker_or_caveat: Q_wall_W is diagnostic/extraction output, not predictive runtime heat-loss input

calculation: Record face-level seed/core U/T/rho; compute area averages and outward mdot proxy from rho U dot A
validation_checks: face count and area match mask; finite values; nonharvest status retained
current_blocker_or_caveat: Limited extraction is not production harvest

inputs: trusted wall T, interface core T, seeded CV volume-average T
calculation: Compute area/volume averages and contrasts: wall-core, core-seed, wall-bulk

inputs: case_config property mode labels, source-property ledgers, source/sink contracts
calculation: Check whether cp, viscosity, k, and source-envelope labels are row-specific and release-ready
validation_checks: labels present but release_ready false where source envelope/cp basis blocked
current_blocker_or_caveat: cp_J_kg_K and row-level source/property basis need follow-on preflight

inputs: thermal ledgers, heat-loss contracts, source/sink setup values
calculation: Assign each heat effect to heater, internal Nu, wall conduction, insulation/quartz, external convection, radiation, cooler/jacket, storage, or residual lane
current_blocker_or_caveat: Residual lane must not be hidden in internal Nu

inputs: target-minus,target,target-plus rows by exact QOI label
calculation: Require same-label neighboring windows before temporal UQ; require same-label mesh family before GCI; only then allow production harvest review
validation_checks: current target rows present but neighbor rows absent
current_blocker_or_caveat: Production harvest and admission stay closed

inputs: case split policy, source-property release flags, protected-row audit
calculation: Join scientific reductions to partition labels and allowed/forbidden fit/model-selection flags
outputs: release/audit tables and thesis claim boundary rows
validation_checks: fit_allowed and model_selection_allowed false where release blocked
current_blocker_or_caveat: No protected scoring or freeze without trigger-gated candidate release
